# Numora

Numora is a framework-agnostic numeric input and number input library for JavaScript and React. It solves the fundamental problems with `<input type="number">` — cursor jumping, scientific notation leaking, paste chaos, mobile keyboard issues, and locale-specific decimal/thousand separator conflicts.

## Packages

- **numora** (vanilla JS / any framework): https://www.npmjs.com/package/numora
- **numora-react** (React wrapper): https://www.npmjs.com/package/numora-react

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://numora.xyz
- Interactive demos (why number inputs break): https://numora.xyz/explore
- Numora JS — Get Started: https://numora.xyz/docs/numora
- Numora JS — Installation: https://numora.xyz/docs/numora/installation
- Numora JS — How It Works: https://numora.xyz/docs/numora/how-it-works
- Numora React — Get Started: https://numora.xyz/docs/numora-react
- Numora React — Installation: https://numora.xyz/docs/numora-react/installation
- Numora React — How It Works: https://numora.xyz/docs/numora-react/how-it-works

## Features

- Formatting: https://numora.xyz/docs/numora/features/formatting
- Value Types: https://numora.xyz/docs/numora/features/value-types
- Decimals: https://numora.xyz/docs/numora/features/decimals
- Sanitization: https://numora.xyz/docs/numora/features/sanitization
- Compact Notation: https://numora.xyz/docs/numora/features/compact-notation
- Scientific Notation: https://numora.xyz/docs/numora/features/scientific-notation
- Leading Zeros: https://numora.xyz/docs/numora/features/leading-zeros
- Locale: https://numora.xyz/docs/numora/features/locale

## Integrations

- React Hook Form: https://numora.xyz/docs/numora-react/integrations/react-hook-form

## API Reference — numora (vanilla JS)

```ts
import { NumoraInput } from 'numora'

const numoraInput = new NumoraInput(containerElement, {
  maxDecimals?: number,         // max decimal places
  minDecimals?: number,         // min decimal places (pads zeros)
  thousandSeparator?: string,   // e.g. ','
  thousandStyle?: 'thousand' | 'lakh' | 'wan',
  decimalSeparator?: string,    // e.g. '.'
  formatOn?: FormatOn,          // FormatOn.Change | FormatOn.Blur
  allowNegative?: boolean,
  allowLeadingZeros?: boolean,
  allowScientificNotation?: boolean,
  locale?: string,              // e.g. 'en-US', 'de-DE'
})
```

## API Reference — numora-react

```tsx
import { NumoraInput, FormatOn } from 'numora-react'

<NumoraInput
  maxDecimals={2}
  minDecimals={0}
  thousandSeparator=","
  thousandStyle="thousand"
  decimalSeparator="."
  formatOn={FormatOn.Change}
  allowNegative={false}
  allowLeadingZeros={false}
  allowScientificNotation={false}
  locale="en-US"
  onChange={(e) => {
    e.target.value    // formatted display string, e.g. "1,234.56"
    e.target.rawValue // clean numeric string, e.g. "1234.56"
  }}
  onRawValueChange={(raw) => console.log(raw)} // shorthand for raw value
/>
```

## Common Use Cases

- **DeFi / financial inputs**: prevent scientific notation, enforce decimal precision, expose raw value for smart contract calls
- **International forms**: locale-aware decimal and thousand separators (e.g. German `1.234,56`)
- **React Hook Form integration**: use `onRawValueChange` to feed clean values into form state
- **Mobile-safe inputs**: normalises mobile keyboard quirks across iOS and Android
- **Formatted display while typing**: thousand separators added live without breaking cursor position

## Source

GitHub: https://github.com/sharqiewicz/numora
